title: corydalis micrantha subsp. micrantha
intro: Corydalis micrantha subsp. micrantha, also known as the small-flowered corydalis, is a flowering plant species within the genus Corydalis. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and relax muscles. Corydalis micrantha subsp. micrantha can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like arthritis, fibromyalgia, and insomnia.
